validations.target: grep -q 'pub mod errors;' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub mod events;' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub mod instructions;' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub mod state;' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub mod utils;' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs

grep -q 'pub fn initialize(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn mint_tokens(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn burn_tokens(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn freeze_account(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn thaw_account(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn pause(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn unpause(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn update_roles(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn update_minter(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn transfer_authority(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn blacklist_add(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn blacklist_remove(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn seize(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs && grep -q 'pub fn attest_reserve(' programs/sss-token/src/lib.rs

grep -q 'pub mod attest_reserve;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod blacklist_add;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod blacklist_remove;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod burn;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod freeze;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod initialize;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod mint;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod pause;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod seize;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod thaw;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod transfer_authority;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod unpause;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod update_minter;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs && grep -q 'pub mod update_roles;' programs/sss-token/src/instructions/mod.rs

grep -q 'pub bump: u8' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub mint: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub master_authority: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub name: String' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub symbol: String' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub uri: String' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub decimals: u8' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub preset: StablecoinPreset' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub enable_permanent_delegate: bool' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub enable_transfer_hook: bool' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub default_account_frozen: bool' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub enable_confidential_transfers: bool' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub is_paused: bool' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub total_minted: u64' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'pub total_burned: u64' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs

grep -q 'SSS1' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'SSS2' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'SSS3' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs && grep -q 'Custom' programs/sss-token/src/state/config.rs

grep -q 'pub master_authority: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/roles.rs && grep -q 'pub pauser: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/roles.rs && grep -q 'pub blacklister: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/roles.rs && grep -q 'pub seizer: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/roles.rs

grep -q 'pub is_active: bool' programs/sss-token/src/state/minter.rs && grep -q 'pub mint_quota: u64' programs/sss-token/src/state/minter.rs && grep -q 'pub total_minted: u64' programs/sss-token/src/state/minter.rs

grep -q 'pub blocked_address: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/blacklist.rs && grep -q 'pub reason: String' programs/sss-token/src/state/blacklist.rs && grep -q 'pub blacklisted_by: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/blacklist.rs

grep -q 'pub reserve_hash: \[u8; 32\]' programs/sss-token/src/state/reserve.rs && grep -q 'pub total_reserves_usd: u64' programs/sss-token/src/state/reserve.rs && grep -q 'pub attested_by: Pubkey' programs/sss-token/src/state/reserve.rs

grep -q 'Unauthorized' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'InvalidAuthority' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'ProgramPaused' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'ProgramNotPaused' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'MinterNotActive' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'MintQuotaExceeded' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'MintAmountZero' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'BurnAmountZero' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'FeatureNotEnabled' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'BlacklistNotEnabled' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'CannotBlacklistAuthority' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'Overflow' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'SeizeAmountZero' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs && grep -q 'SeizeSameAccount' programs/sss-token/src/errors.rs

grep -q 'StablecoinInitialized' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'TokensMinted' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'TokensBurned' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'AccountFrozen' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'AccountThawed' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'ProgramPaused' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'ProgramUnpaused' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'RoleUpdated' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'MinterUpdated' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'AuthorityTransferred' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'BlacklistAdded' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'BlacklistRemoved' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'TokensSeized' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs && grep -q 'AuditLogRecorded' programs/sss-token/src/events.rs
grep -q 'getConfigPda' sdk/src/pda.ts && grep -q 'getRoleRegistryPda' sdk/src/pda.ts && grep -q 'getMinterInfoPda' sdk/src/pda.ts && grep -q 'getBlacklistPda' sdk/src/pda.ts
grep -q 'SSS1' sdk/src/presets.ts && grep -q 'SSS2' sdk/src/presets.ts && grep -q 'SSS3' sdk/src/presets.ts

grep -q 'Init' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Mint' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Burn' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Freeze' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Thaw' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Pause' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Unpause' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Blacklist' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Seize' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Roles' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Minter' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Attest' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Info' cli/src/main.rs && grep -q 'Dashboard' cli/src/main.rs
grep -q 'SSS-1' README.md && grep -q 'SSS-2' README.md && grep -q 'SSS-3' README.md
grep -q 'init' cli/README.md && grep -q 'mint' cli/README.md && grep -q 'burn' cli/README.md && grep -q 'freeze' cli/README.md && grep -q 'pause' cli/README.md
grep -q 'SSS-1' docs/presets.md && grep -q 'SSS-2' docs/presets.md && grep -q 'SSS-3' docs/presets.md
grep -q '/mint' docs/API.md && grep -q '/burn' docs/API.md && grep -q '/blacklist' docs/API.md
anchor build 2>&1 | grep 'warning:' | grep -v 'cfg.*condition' | grep -v 'deprecated.*realloc' | grep -v 'ambiguous glob' | grep -v 'generated.*warnings' | wc -l
